scripts.dev: bun x concurrently "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:client"
scripts.dev:client: bun build --watch ./src/client/index.tsx --outdir ./public/_app --entry-naming home.[ext] & bun build --watch ./src/client/viewer.tsx --outdir ./public/_app --entry-naming viewer.[ext]
scripts.build:client: bun build ./src/client/index.tsx --outdir ./public/_app --entry-naming home.[hash].[ext] --minify && bun build ./src/client/viewer.tsx --outdir ./public/_app --entry-naming viewer.[hash].[ext] --minify
scripts.build: bun run build:client && bun run build:server
